untranslatable_reason: Signal requires microstructure-specific indicators not in allowed set: (1) 'Dealer long inventory position >= 75th percentile' - no dealer inventory indicator available; (2) 'Bid-ask spread widened >= 150% of baseline' - no bid-ask spread indicator available; (3) 'Volume from uninformed liquidity demanders elevated' - no order flow classification available. Approximated entry using price_pos_20 for discount and vol_ratio_20 for volume elevation, but these are weak proxies for the intended dealer inventory and spread mechanics.
translation_notes: Price discount approximated as price_pos_20 < 0.97 (3% below 20-day range midpoint). Dealer inventory accumulation and spread widening cannot be directly expressed without microstructure data feeds. Volume elevation approximated with vol_ratio_20 > 1.0. Exit condition of price returning within 0.5% of fundamental value mapped to price_pos_20 > 0.995. This translation loses the core signal logic around dealer inventory risk and information asymmetry.
